sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Kiora Pharmaceuticals to Participate in Piper Sandler Virtual Ophthalmology Symposium
feed.summary: Kiora Pharmaceuticals, Inc. announced its participation in an investor fireside chat at the Piper Sandler Virtual Ophthalmology Symposium on July 9, 2026, at 2:30 p.m. EDT. The presentation will be available live and for replay on Kiora's Investor Relations homepage. Kiora Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing advanced therapies for retinal diseases.

feed.title: The Price They Pay: The Mental Health Toll on Working Moms
feed.summary: This article highlights a session at MACo’s 2026 Summer Conference, hosted by Cigna Healthcare, titled "The Price They Pay: The Mental Health Toll on Working Moms." The session description, however, focuses on expanding and strengthening school meal programs in Maryland, discussing their positive impact on students, schools, and communities by reducing future healthcare and social costs. It encourages attendees to register for the conference to learn more about this and other initiatives.

feed.title: Pfizer Comirnaty from Pfizer Inc. - updated COVID vaccine leans into fall booster demand
feed.summary: Pfizer's updated Comirnaty COVID-19 vaccine for 2024-2025 targets Omicron XBB-lineage variants and is a key component of the U.S. fall booster campaign. The article details its distribution, pricing shifts from government to commercial channels, and highlights its role as a significant, though no longer dominant, product in Pfizer's diversified portfolio. It also covers practical aspects from pharmacy operations to investor considerations.

feed.title: Form 144 SCHWAB CHARLES CORP For: 2 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 144 for Schwab Charles Corp on July 2nd, as reported by Investing.com. It is a brief, standard financial news update, likely indicating an insider's intent to sell restricted stock. The piece also includes various financial market data and related news headlines.

feed.title: Ohio Rep. David Taylor Bought Up to $30K Worth of Chevron Stock
feed.summary: Ohio Representative David Taylor recently purchased between $2,002 and $30,000 worth of Chevron (NYSE: CVX) stock on June 15, 2026, as disclosed in a July 1, 2026 report. This adds to his 200 stock trades totaling over $312,000 in the past three years, which included transactions in UnitedHealth Group and Eli Lilly. The article highlights the importance of congressional transaction disclosures under the STOCK Act as a factor, but not the sole reason, for investment decisions.

feed.title: Form 144 LAM RESEARCH CORP For: 2 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article reports on a Form 144 filing for LAM RESEARCH CORP (LRCX) on July 2nd. It is a brief announcement from Investing.com, typical of their financial news alerts. The article also includes various market data and related news headlines.

feed.title: FAA issues guidance for Boeing aircraft amid Canada 5G interference
feed.summary: The U.S. Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) has issued new airworthiness directives for Boeing aircraft due to Canada's enhanced 5G Lower C-band environment. These directives impose operating restrictions on planes lacking radio altimeters proven to withstand the updated 5G interference, which became effective July 1 after Canada removed airport exclusion zones. The FAA's action follows a report from Transport Canada about a more severe 5G interference environment and Boeing's analysis indicating certain configurations won't tolerate it, leading to model-specific directives for various Boeing aircraft.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare gains as investors weigh improving physician trends and a possible rebound after prior guidance-driven weakness
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare (HCA) saw a 3.6% increase in its stock price, likely driven by positive analyst reports regarding improving physician staffing trends in the second quarter. This rebound follows earlier pressure on the stock due to reduced 2026 earnings guidance. The article also details recent insider trading activity, primarily sales, and significant institutional investor movements, alongside analyst ratings and price targets for HCA.

feed.title: Form 4 Public Storage For: 2 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article from Investing.com reports on a Form 4 filing for Public Storage (PSA) on July 2nd. It provides the stock's current performance, showing an increase of 0.86%, and briefly lists various market data, including indices, commodities, and individual stock performances.

feed.title: US Bancorp Retirees Drop Appeal Over Pension Calculation Data
feed.summary: US Bancorp retirees have dropped their Eighth Circuit appeal regarding the bank's pension calculations for early retirees. The lawsuit alleged that US Bancorp used outdated life expectancy data, leading to shortchanged monthly benefits for those who chose non-traditional pension formats. The retirees had sought review of a previous decision that favored the bank, which stated that federal benefits law does not require implicit "reasonableness" for actuarial assumptions.

feed.title: Amex, Apple team on rewards
feed.summary: American Express has expanded its partnership with Apple, allowing cardholders to redeem rewards points at checkout via Apple Pay online or in-app. This move is part of Amex's strategy to integrate more businesses into its loyalty program, following similar initiatives with Fanatics. The collaboration builds on a long-standing relationship between the two companies, facing competition in the payments landscape.

feed.title: Dominion Energy Inc highlights regulated utility operations as investors track U.S. power demand
feed.summary: Dominion Energy Inc operates a large regulated electric and gas utility network in the U.S., with its earnings tied to capital spending, regulatory returns, and power demand. The company focuses on capital investments for grid modernization and integrating renewable energy, balancing reliability and affordability while navigating the energy transition. Its stable, regulated utility model provides predictable cash flows, making it relevant for income-oriented investors, while operational reliability and a disciplined financing strategy are key to its sustained success.

feed.title: Domino’s is giving away $1 million in free pizza after USMNT star’s red card
feed.summary: Domino's is giving away $1 million in free "Emergency Pizzas" after USMNT player Folarin Balogun received a red card during a World Cup match against Bosnia and Herzegovina. The promotion was announced by Domino's in May to "soften the blow" for fans if a US national team player was sent off. Fans had to register by June 10 and be enrolled in the Domino's Rewards program to qualify for the free pizza, redeemable through September 2, 2026.

feed.title: Brown Advisory Large-Cap Growth Strategy Picked Axon Enterprises Inc (AXON) Amid Broader Sell-Off
feed.summary: Brown Advisory's Large-Cap Growth Strategy revealed its first-quarter 2026 investor letter, noting a decline but improved relative performance. The strategy initiated a new position in Axon Enterprise, Inc. (AXON), recognizing its leadership in public safety technology, including TASER devices, body cameras, and AI-enabled software. Despite a broader software sell-off, Brown Advisory views this as an attractive entry point for AXON due to strong demand for its mission-critical solutions and growing AI revenue.

feed.title: Starbucks Corp. balances global growth and changing consumer habits
feed.summary: Starbucks Corporation is adapting its strategies to manage global growth, evolving consumer habits, and cost pressures. The company focuses on refining its diverse store footprint, enhancing

feed.title: Ecolab Inc outlook and operations context
feed.summary: Ecolab Inc. (ECL) is a global provider of hygiene, water treatment, and infection-prevention solutions for industrial and institutional customers. The company's diversified customer base and recurring-service model offer investors exposure to long-term trends like stricter hygiene standards, water scarcity, and efficient resource management. Ecolab's integrated approach, combining specialized chemicals, equipment, and on-site support, positions it as a critical supplier for various sectors, including foodservice, healthcare, and manufacturing.

feed.title: The eBay Motors Parts & Accessories subscription - eBay Inc. bets on steady DIY auto demand
feed.summary: eBay Inc. has quietly launched a Motors Parts & Accessories subscription service in select US markets, targeting DIY mechanics and small repair shops. This recurring plan offers discounted parts, shipping perks, and early access to deals, aiming to boost repeat purchases and retain customers within eBay's marketplace. The initiative is part of eBay's broader strategy to enhance its auto parts footprint and leverage its fitment tools for a competitive edge against both online and physical auto parts retailers.

feed.title: Air Products (APD) director receives phantom stock unit award
feed.summary: Air Products & Chemicals (APD) director Tonit M. Calaway was granted 20.6217 phantom deferred stock units as compensation under the company's Deferred Compensation Program for Directors. These units, valued at $271.35 each, are payable in common shares after the director's board service ends, bringing Calaway's total holdings to 3,112.1686 phantom stock units. This transaction is classified as a compensation-related acquisition rather than a market purchase or sale.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services Stock Surges 13%, With A 9-Day Winning Spree
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) stock has seen a 13% surge over a 9-day winning streak, increasing its market cap by $3.0 billion to $26 billion. Despite this recent strong performance, the stock is considered "Relatively Expensive" due to its "Very High valuation," although its operating performance and financial condition are strong. The article also provides a table comparing WST's returns against the S&P 500 over various periods and highlights the importance of predictive signals for identifying future winners.

feed.title: Con Edison asks some NYC customers to begin conserving energy
feed.summary: Con Edison has requested that customers in parts of the Bronx and northern Manhattan conserve energy due to a heat wave. The utility company is repairing equipment and has reduced voltage by 8% in these areas. Residents are asked to limit the use of high-energy appliances and air conditioning to help maintain service.

feed.title: AIG Names Nancy Bewlay Executive Vice President, Global Chief Underwriting Officer
feed.summary: American International Group (AIG) has appointed Nancy Bewlay as Executive Vice President and Global Chief Underwriting Officer, effective September 8, 2026. Bewlay will report to President and CEO Eric Andersen and join the company's Executive Leadership Team. With over 30 years of industry experience, Bewlay will be responsible for overseeing AIG's underwriting strategy and commitment to underwriting discipline.

feed.title: United Rentals’ Wedge remote monitoring solution named 2026 Industrial IoT Product of the Year
feed.summary: United Rentals' Wedge remote monitoring solution has been honored as a 2026 Industrial IoT Product of the Year by TMC, recognizing its value in connected operations and real-time data. Wedge offers customers the ability to remotely monitor and control equipment and environmental conditions, providing actionable insights to reduce risk and improve jobsite performance across various industrial applications. This award highlights United Rentals' commitment to digital innovation and its vision for connected worksites that enhance safety, productivity, and uptime.

feed.title: Form 4 KORU Medical Systems Inc For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article from Investing.com is a regulatory filing update, specifically a Form 4, for KORU Medical Systems Inc for July 1. It provides a brief announcement about the filing and includes general market data and other news items from Investing.com, but no further details about the Form 4 itself.

feed.title: Form 4 Jewett-Cameron Trading Company Ltd For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article reports on a Form 4 filing for Jewett-Cameron Trading Company Ltd for July 1st. It appears to be a standard financial news brief from Investing.com, providing basic information about the regulatory filing. The content focuses primarily on general market data and other news, with the Form 4 announcement serving as a concise update.

feed.title: Jabil stock falls after filing mixed shelf offering with SEC
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. (NYSE:JBL) shares dropped 4.1% after the company filed a mixed shelf registration statement with the SEC. This filing allows Jabil to offer various securities like debt, preferred stock, common stock, warrants, or units in the future, providing flexibility to access capital markets. The specific terms and timing of any potential offering were not disclosed.

feed.title: Electronic Arts stock hits all-time high at 205.96 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Electronic Arts Inc. (EA) stock has reached an all-time high of $205.96 USD, hitting just below its 52-week high, reflecting a 32.54% increase over the past year. Despite its recent financial quarter missing Wall Street expectations, the company achieved record net bookings and operating cash flow for fiscal year 2026. InvestingPro data indicates the stock is in overbought territory and may be overvalued with a P/E ratio of 58.

feed.title: Electronic Arts stock hits all-time high at 205.96 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Electronic Arts (EA) stock has reached an all-time high of $205.96, reflecting a 32.54% increase over the past year and bringing its market capitalization to $51.6 billion. Despite this milestone, InvestingPro indicates the stock may be overvalued with an RSI suggesting overbought conditions and a P/E ratio of 58. The company's record

feed.title: ConocoPhillips Contributes $1 Million for Earthquake Relief in Venezuela
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips has announced a $1 million contribution to support humanitarian relief efforts in communities affected by recent earthquakes in Venezuela. The company will also double match employee donations. This aid will help local organizations provide essential resources like food, water, shelter, and medical care to those impacted.

feed.title: LifeStance Health Stock 9-Day Winning Spree: Stock Climbs 33%
feed.summary: LifeStance Health (LFST) stock experienced a 9-day winning streak, resulting in a 33% increase and a market cap surge of $1.1 billion to $4.4 billion. Despite this rally, the article suggests the stock is "Unattractive" due to moderate operating performance, financial condition, and high valuation, advocating for predictive signals over post-event notifications for investment decisions. The performance data shows LFST outperforming the S&P 500 across various periods, highlighting its volatility and potential for sharp reversals.

feed.title: Delta Pilots Accuse Airline Of 'Unacceptable' Summer Flight Delays
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines pilots, represented by ALPA, have launched a website with travel tips for passengers as summer approaches, coinciding with the airline's recent reliability issues. While some view this as pilots criticizing management ahead of contract talks, the initiative aims to help flyers navigate potential disruptions. The pilots emphasize that they share passenger frustrations over delays and cancellations and are working "record numbers" of their days off to prioritize safety.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil (NYSE: XOM) files Form 25 to remove Common Stock from NYSE listing
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp (NYSE: XOM) has filed a Form 25 with the SEC to voluntarily remove its Common Stock from listing and/or registration on the New York Stock Exchange. Both the NYSE and Exxon Mobil have certified compliance with the necessary rules under 17 CFR 240.12d2-2 for this withdrawal. The filing is procedural, documenting adherence to delisting regulations, but does not specify operational effects, timing, or required shareholder actions.

feed.title: Consolidated Edison focuses on regulated utilities and steady returns
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison, a major regulated utility in New York, focuses on stable returns through its electricity and gas distribution networks. The company's business model involves predictable cash flows due to regulatory oversight and significant investment in infrastructure modernization and clean energy initiatives. While not offering rapid growth, it appeals to investors seeking steady income and defensive characteristics in a diversified portfolio.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines stock. Focus shifts to operations and capacity
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE: LUV) is facing investor scrutiny over its operations and network execution, as the company's straightforward low-fare model relies heavily on day-to-day operational efficiency. Investors are closely monitoring capacity plans, unit revenue trends, and cost pressures, as these factors directly impact margin expectations. The airline's business, centered on short-haul U.S. flying, point-to-point routes, and a single Boeing 737 aircraft family, means that fleet planning and maintenance are critical to its performance.

feed.title: [144] LABCORP HOLDINGS INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This SEC filing (Form 144) for Labcorp Holdings Inc. (LH) details a proposed sale of securities, specifically 234 shares of common stock acquired through restricted stock vesting on July 1, 2026. The aggregate market value of the shares to be sold is $66968.46, with the sale expected around July 2, 2026, on the NYSE via Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC. The filing confirms no previous sales by the filer in the past three months and includes a standard representation that the filer has no knowledge of undisclosed material adverse information.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Fell on Below-Consensus Forecast
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) saw a decline after reporting a lower-than-consensus expected outlook for procedure growth in Q1 2026, as noted in Brown Advisory's Large-Cap Growth Strategy investor letter. Despite solid operational performance, macro uncertainty impacted sentiment, leading to a 3.93% one-month return loss and a 26.10% loss over 52 weeks. Brown Advisory remains confident in ISRG's long-term growth but suggests that some AI stocks offer greater short-term promise.

feed.title: Franklin Resources Inc navigates global asset flows as investors reassess risk
feed.summary: Franklin Resources Inc is facing fluctuating demand for its mutual funds and investment products as global markets respond to changes in interest rates and risk appetite. The company, known for its Franklin Templeton brand, operates as a global asset management firm relying on management and advisory fees tied to assets under management. It is working to balance revenue, performance, and client retention within a competitive industry characterized by fee compression and the rise of low-cost passive products.

feed.title: How 5 top food and beverage brands are celebrating America’s 250th
feed.summary: Major food and beverage brands are celebrating America's 250th birthday by launching patriotic-themed products and marketing campaigns. Companies like General Mills, Kraft Heinz, Samuel Adams, Campbell's, and Chobani are introducing limited-edition flavors, special packaging, and innovations that pay homage to the nation's semiquincentennial. These efforts aim to boost sales, especially with the Fourth of July coinciding with the World Cup.

feed.title: Amcor, Kelpi Explore Bioplastic Barrier Coating
feed.summary: Amcor and UK-based startup Kelpi are collaborating to explore bio-based coating technologies sourced from seaweed that could enhance the performance and sustainability of Amcor’s AmFiber fiber-based packaging. This partnership aims to improve barrier properties while maintaining recyclability within paper streams, aligning with the Ellen MacArthur Foundation's call for innovation in fiber-based flexible packaging. The companies will assess the scalability of Kelpi's seaweed-derived coating to support broader circular economy goals in consumer goods markets.

feed.title: U.S. Bank Mobile Banking app - US Bancorp leans into everyday digital finance
feed.summary: The U.S. Bank Mobile Banking app is used by over 10 million devices, facilitating billions of routine transactions annually. It integrates essential banking services like checking balances, bill payments, Zelle transfers, and remote check deposits, and offers robust security features and card controls. US Bancorp emphasizes the app's role in its digital strategy, aiming to improve efficiency and reduce costs by channeling over 80% of consumer transactions through digital platforms.

feed.title: REG - JPMorgan Asset Mngt Prologis, Inc. - Form 8.3-Prologis, Inc.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Asset Management has disclosed its positions and dealings in Prologis, Inc. shares, as required by Rule 8.3 of the Takeover Code. The disclosure includes their current holdings of over 11.6 million common shares, representing 1.25% of the company, and details numerous purchase and sale transactions of Prologis, Inc. securities on July 1, 2026. JPMorgan Asset Management is stated as a financial adviser to Prologis, Inc. and is also making disclosures related to SEGRO plc.

feed.title: Southern Company (SO) director Lizanne Thomas receives 473 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Southern Company director Lizanne Thomas was granted 473.0866 deferred stock units as part of her quarterly equity retainer, with each unit valued at $95.12. This transaction increased her total holdings to 7,757.6864 deferred stock units, which include units from dividend reinvestment. These units are deferred compensation and will convert

feed.title: Southern Company (SO) director receives quarterly deferred stock unit award
feed.summary: Southern Company director John D. Johns was awarded 473.0866 deferred stock units as part of his quarterly director equity retainer, valued at $95.12 per unit. This award increases his direct holdings to 88,550.8618 deferred stock units. These units represent the right to receive one share of Southern Company common stock and are settled after his service on the board ends, with no exercise or expiration date.

feed.title: Director at Southern Co (NYSE: SO) receives new deferred equity award
feed.summary: Southern Company director Janaki Akella was granted 473.0866 deferred stock units as a quarterly director equity retainer, valued at $95.12 per unit. These units, which represent common stock, are deferred until her board service concludes, increasing her total deferred holdings to 21,178.9803 units. This transaction, categorized as a grant or award, is part of the company's 2021 Equity and Incentive Compensation Plan and includes units acquired through dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: DTE Energy (NYSE: DTB) director granted cash-settled phantom stock units
feed.summary: DTE Energy director Gary Torgow was granted 240.75 cash-settled phantom stock units (DTB). These units, valued at $150.57 each, are tied to DTE common stock and are part of his non-employee director fees. This transaction brings his total phantom stock balance to 7,338.6 units, which will be paid in cash at a future date of his choosing.

feed.title: Ondo Finance debuts SEC-aligned tokenized stock model with BlackRock ETF, Micron shares
feed.summary: Ondo Finance has launched tokenized versions of BlackRock's iShares Core S&P 500 ETF (IVV) and Micron Technology (MU) shares, establishing an SEC-aligned model for tokenized securities within the existing U.S. regulatory framework. This initiative utilizes Oasis Pro as the transfer agent and Broadridge for shareholder communications, demonstrating how blockchain-based securities can integrate with traditional finance, although the product is not yet available to U.S. investors. Ondo's approach follows the SEC's third-party custodial guidance, aiming to modernize capital markets through tokenization.

feed.title: Klarna Wins $1.97 Billion Antitrust Award in PriceRunner Case Against Google
feed.summary: Klarna Group Plc's subsidiary PriceRunner has won a $1.97 billion antitrust damages case against Google, including accrued interest, for lost revenue due to Google's preferential treatment of its own comparison-shopping service. This judgment could significantly boost Klarna's resources as it expands its PriceRunner-powered product search strategy. Analysts currently rate KLAR stock as a "Buy" with a $25.00 price target, though TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, has a "Neutral" rating due to inconsistent profitability despite positive momentum.

feed.title: Hardman Johnston Large Cap Equity Holds Firm on IQVIA Holdings (IQV). Here’s Why
feed.summary: Hardman Johnston Large Cap Equity Strategy maintained its position on IQVIA Holdings Inc. (IQV) in Q1 2026, despite the stock being under pressure from AI disruption fears and rising interest rates. The firm believes IQVIA's capabilities make it a strong player in the biotech and pharmaceutical industries. Although IQVIA is not among the most popular stocks with hedge funds, other investors like Artisan Value Fund have also initiated positions, highlighting the company's proprietary data and domain expertise.

feed.title: Linkhome Holdings (NASDAQ:LHAI) stock trades as $44 mln market cap faces $28 mln mortgage limit
feed.summary: Linkhome Holdings (NASDAQ:LHAI) rallied significantly following its acquisition of Mortgage One and the launch of a GPU-financing effort. Despite a premarket dip, the stock's market capitalization reached $44.5 million, with Mortgage One contributing $28 million in warehouse capacity. Investors are also looking ahead to a shareholder vote on a reverse stock split and a new equity plan in mid-July.

feed.title: Logitech focuses on long-term growth as investors track its global hardware footprint
feed.summary: Logitech International SA is strategically refining its hardware and peripherals approach, aiming for long-term growth in the competitive tech market. The company maintains a strong global presence with diversified product lines, including mice, keyboards, webcams, and collaboration tools, catering to both consumer and enterprise demands. Its focus on productivity, collaboration, and even gaming peripherals positions it as a key player for investors tracking technology and hardware trends.

feed.title: Klarna Group (KLAR) CFO awarded 15,944 shares in Form 4 filing
feed.summary: Klarna Group plc's CFO, Niclas Neglen, was awarded 15,944 ordinary shares on June 30, 2026, at a price of $0.00 per share, increasing his direct holdings to 86,673 shares. This grant, along with an earlier acquisition of 127 shares on May 6, 2026, through a derivative conversion, was reported in a recent Form 4 filing, indicating compensation-related share awards. All his reported holdings are direct.
